course_title: CAPSTONE DESIGN IN ELECTRICAL AND COMPUTER ENGINEERING
description: Apply electrical and computer engineering knowledge and skills acquired to real-world electrical and computer engineering design projects.

prerequisites.prerequisites_text: COMP SCI 300,E C E 340, (E C E 303,304,305,306,308,313,315, or317), senior standing, and declared in Electrical Engineering BS or Computer Engineering BS. Not open to students with credit forE C E 453,454, or554.
